description: An API endpoint watched by the state machine. api:tick fetches the URL, hashes the body, and compares to the last snapshot in state.db.api_watches. On change: the body (or a watch_field slice) is written to output_tag and a state-machine on_transition event fires, letting any Script react.

output_tag.description: Tag to write on change. Transitions fire on its value-level.

watch_field.description: Optional dot-path into the JSON body (e.g. `paperCount`). When set, only the field's value is compared + written.

interval_s.description: Minimum seconds between fetches. api:tick skips a watch if too recent.
